  Objective: Implement response recording module to capture candidate answers during the technical interview
data.result:
```python
import smtplib
from email.mime.text import MIMEText
from email.mime.multipart import MIMEMultipart

class EmailNotification:
    def __init__(self, smtp_server, port, sender_email, sender_password):
        """
        Initializes the EmailNotification module.

        Args:
            smtp_server (str): The SMTP server address (e.g., 'smtp.gmail.com').
            port (int): The port number for the SMTP server (e.g., 587).
            sender_email (str): The email address of the sender.
            sender_password (str): The password for the sender's email account.
        """
        self.smtp_server = smtp_server
        self.port = port
        self.sender_email = sender_email
        self.sender_password = sender_password

    def send_email(self, recipient_email, subject, body, content_type='plain'):
        """
        Sends an email to the specified recipient.

        Args:
            recipient_email (str): The email address of the recipient.
            subject (str): The subject of the email.
            body (str): The body of the email.
            content_type (str): 'plain' for plain text emails, 'html' for HTML emails.  Defaults to 'plain'.
        """
        msg = MIMEMultipart()
        msg['From'] = self.sender_email
        msg['To'] = recipient_email
        msg['Subject'] = subject

        if content_type == 'plain':
            msg.attach(MIMEText(body, 'plain'))
        elif content_type == 'html':
            msg.attach(MIMEText(body, 'html'))
        else:
            raise ValueError("Invalid content_type.  Must be 'plain' or 'html'.")


        try:
            server = smtplib.SMTP(self.smtp_server, self.port)
            server.starttls()  # Upgrade connection to secure
            server.login(self.sender_email, self.sender_password)
            server.sendmail(self.sender_email, recipient_email, msg.as_string())
            server.quit()
            print(f"Email sent successfully to {recipient_email}")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Error sending email: {e}")

    def send_interview_invitation(self, recipient_email, candidate_name, interview_date, interview_time, interviewer_name, meeting_link):
        """
        Sends an interview invitation email to the candidate.

        Args:
            recipient_email (str): The candidate's email address.
            candidate_name (str): The candidate's name.
            interview_date (str): The date of the interview (e.g., "October 26, 2023").
            interview_time (str): The time of the interview (e.g., "10:00 AM").
            interviewer_name (str): The name of the interviewer.
            meeting_link (str): The link to the online meeting.
        """
        subject = "Interview Invitation"
        body = f"""
Dear {candidate_name},

We are pleased to invite you to an interview for the position.

Date: {interview_date}
Time: {interview_time}
Interviewer: {interviewer_name}
Meeting Link: {meeting_link}

Please be on time and prepared to discuss your qualifications and experience.

We look forward to meeting you.

Sincerely,
The Hiring Team
"""
        self.send_email(recipient_email, subject, body)

    def send_followup_email(self, recipient_email, candidate_name):
        """
        Sends a follow-up email to the candidate after the interview.

        Args:
            recipient_email (str): The candidate's email address.
            candidate_name (str): The candidate's name.
        """
        subject = "Following Up on Your Interview"
        body = f"""
Dear {candidate_name},

Thank you for taking the time to interview with us. We appreciate you sharing your experience and qualifications.

We are currently reviewing all candidates and will be in touch soon with an update on your application status.

Sincerely,
The Hiring Team
"""
        self.send_email(recipient_email, subject, body)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    # Example Usage (Replace with your actual credentials and details)
    smtp_server = 'smtp.gmail.com'  # or your SMTP server
    port = 587  # or the appropriate port for your server
    sender_email = "your_email@gmail.com"  # Replace with your email
    sender_password = "your_password"  # Replace with your password (or app password)

    email_notifier = EmailNotification(smtp_server, port, sender_email, sender_password)

    # Example 1: Send interview invitation
    recipient_email = "candidate_email@example.com"  # Replace with the candidate's email
    candidate_name = "John Doe"
    interview_date = "November 1, 2023"
    interview_time = "2:00 PM"
    interviewer_name = "Jane Smith"
    meeting_link = "https://meet.google.com/xyz"
    email_notifier.send_interview_invitation(recipient_email, candidate_name, interview_date, interview_time, interviewer_name, meeting_link)

    # Example 2: Send follow-up email
    email_notifier.send_followup_email(recipient_email, candidate_name)
```
